title: Architect WorldCup Prediction B, the LLM analyst call
description: Per-tie LLM forecast produced in Phase 2 with no tools, blind to Prediction A, reading only the frozen dossier. Each nonzero factor must cite dossier facts with source tiers; an uncited or unsupported factor scores zero and is flagged insufficient evidence.

prediction.description: Identifies this as the LLM analyst call.

committed_at.description: Git commit time, before-kickoff leakage proof. Null until committed.

dossier_ref.description: Path and content hash of the frozen dossier this call read.

home_team.description: Nominal home, the first-listed team in the official fixture, stated explicitly to the model.

factor_scores.description: One score per factor in the frozen taxonomy.

lens.description: Expert lens used, for example club scout, match analyst, tournament strategist, sports psychologist.

score.description: Net advantage to the nominal home side, minus three to plus three, zero neutral or insufficient evidence.

insufficient_evidence.description: True when the dossier carries no support; the score must then be zero.

evidence.description: Cited dossier facts. Required non-empty whenever the score is nonzero.

anchor_signal.description: Fixed-weight aggregation of the factor scores; the model does not set its own weights.

anchor_departure.description: Signed gap between the emitted lean and the anchor-implied lean.

departure_justification.description: Required in writing when the departure exceeds the configured tolerance.

temperature.description: Recorded as text: temperature is removed on Opus 4.8, so this notes that and that determinism is best effort.
